rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type or implementation scopes based on the scope of referenced ports and bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in appropriate scopes without altering component structure.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require placement in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes unless they are valid variables or outputs.
Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables.
